grant_title: Bridgeport Receives $1.2 Million from EPA for Brownfield Cleanup
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; focuses on community health and redevelopment.
eligibility_summary: The grant is available to the City of Bridgeport and the Bridgeport Housing Authority for the cleanup of brownfields within the city. Funds will be used for assessment, cleanup, and redevelopment of contaminated properties, including monitoring neighborhood health and supporting community involvement activities.
